content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Learn a professional client workflow to overcome debugging roadblocks. A high-impact Case Study for freelancers using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop wasting billable hours manually tracing bugs. By integrating Antigravity for architectural analysis and Claude Code for automated remediation, you create a repeatable, high-velocity workflow. This system transforms debugging from a chaotic bottleneck into a predictable, client-facing deliverable, allowing you to ship production-ready code faster than your competitors.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client’s Slack notification is blinking, and your codebase has turned into a labyrinth of silent failures. You’re staring at a stack trace that makes no sense, and the pressure to ship is mounting. This is the moment where most freelancers burn out—trapped in a cycle of trial-and-error debugging that kills profitability and ruins your reputation for speed.

But elite developers don’t 'debug'; they orchestrate resolution. By shifting from manual investigation to an AI-augmented pipeline, you stop reacting to errors and start engineering solutions. This case study details the exact workflow used by top-tier AI builders to neutralize technical debt, maintain project velocity, and deliver flawless results under tight deadlines.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Domain
steps.description: Before fixing, you must define the boundaries of the bug. Use Antigravity to map the dependency graph and pinpoint exactly where the logic diverges from the requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current execution path for [Feature Name]. Map all state transitions and identify where the data payload deviates from the expected schema.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'find the entry point for the failing module and list all cross-file dependencies'

steps.title: Automate Reproduction
steps.description: Create a minimal reproduction script. If you can't isolate the bug in a vacuum, you can't prove the fix works to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test harness that replicates the error state using the provided input logs. Ensure the test fails consistently before proceeding.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a vitest file that reproduces the specific runtime error in the auth controller'

steps.title: Architectural Remediation
steps.description: Apply a structural fix rather than a patch. Use AI to suggest refactors that prevent the bug from re-emerging in similar modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the identified logic bottleneck to use a more robust pattern, such as the Strategy or State pattern, to ensure scalability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'refactor the error-prone logic into a middleware pattern that validates inputs before execution'

steps.title: Regression Verification
steps.description: Ensure the fix doesn't break adjacent features. Run your automated suite across the entire project scope.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze potential side effects of the proposed refactor on downstream services and suggest defensive programming assertions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'execute all integration tests and verify that no regression occurs in the billing module'

steps.title: Client-Ready Documentation
steps.description: Turn the technical fix into a clear summary for your client. This builds immense trust and justifies your premium rate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a non-technical summary of the bug, the root cause, and the preventative measures implemented, formatted for a client update email.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a status report detailing the fix, the testing performed, and why this solution is future-proof'

pro_tips: Always maintain a 'Golden State' branch. If the AI suggests a complex refactor, you need a single-command revert to stay productive.
Use Claude Code to generate 'self-healing' comments that explain the 'why' behind complex logic to help clients understand your value.
Never accept the first fix from an AI. Always ask for a second, more memory-efficient alternative to show you are optimizing for performance.
Integrate your Antigravity logs directly into your commit messages to create an automated audit trail for your clients.
Debug during the 'low-energy' hours of your day. Automating the heavy lifting allows you to focus on high-level architecture when you are at your peak.
resources: Effective Prompt Engineering for Devs: https://github.com/awesome-ai-prompts
content.next_steps: Implement this workflow on your smallest current project to build muscle memory before applying it to high-stakes enterprise clients.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start mastering your craft. By professionalizing your debugging workflow, you reclaim hours of your week and prove your worth as a high-velocity developer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
